user.title: Select Device Type
user.description: Choose whether you are adding a Pico (ventilation/air quality) or Polaris (HVAC) device.

pico_scan.title: Scan for Pico Devices
pico_scan.description: The scan will probe every host in the subnet using the provided PIN. Only devices sharing this PIN will be found.

pico_scan_confirm.title: Confirm Pico Device
pico_scan_confirm.description: Found Pico at **{ip}**. You may set a custom name.

polaris_scan.title: Scan for Polaris Devices
polaris_scan.description: The scan probes TCP port 1235 across the subnet. A /24 scan takes roughly 8 seconds.

polaris_scan_confirm.title: Confirm Polaris Device
polaris_scan_confirm.description: Found Polaris at **{ip}**. You may set a custom name and polling interval.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the device. Check the IP address and PIN.
error.discovery_failed: Auto-discovery scan failed. Check your network settings.
error.no_devices_found: No new devices found on the network. All discovered devices may already be configured.
